name: 戰場/宮門攻防
description: 從宮廷內鬥升級為軍事衝突，stakes從個人生死擴大到國家存亡。場景的宏大感與前面密室式宮鬥形成對比，給全劇帶來史詩感的高潮。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: All soldiers, the Tate and Horton family have betrayed us. Conspiring with the traitor Tyler. Follow me to eliminate all traitors. ... The insurgents have reached the palace gates. His Majesty was overwhelmed by stress and collapsed after spitting blood.
examples.context: 從宮廷內鬥升級為軍事衝突，stakes從個人生死擴大到國家存亡。場景的宏大感與前面密室式宮鬥形成對比，給全劇帶來史詩感的高潮。
